# New App Request: tesla_fsd

**App name:** Tesla FSD
**Repo:** https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/flipper-tesla-fsd
**Category:** GPIO
**License:** GPL-3.0
**Requires:** Electronic Cats CAN Bus Add-On (MCP2515)

**What it does:**
Enables Tesla FSD by modifying CAN bus frames in real-time. Auto-detects HW3/HW4, handles nag suppression, speed profile defaults to fastest. Single-bus operation via OBD-II — no MITM needed.

**Why include it:**
First Flipper app for Tesla CAN bus FSD control. High demand in the Tesla + Flipper community. Clean codebase, MIT-licensed MCP2515 library, GPL-3.0 app.
